name: retirement-cash-flow-planner
description: Marketplace for the Retirement Cash Flow Planner plugin — builds a personalized, multi-decade retirement financial plan as an Excel workbook.

plugins.name: retirement-cash-flow-planner
plugins.description: Build a personalized multi-decade retirement financial plan — phased after-tax cash flow, a Roth conversion strategy, a federal + state tax calculator, and a net worth projection — as an Excel workbook tailored to your own dates, balances, and goals.
